name: Data Quality & AI Insights Dashboard
description: Tracks quality score trends across Bronze/Silver/Gold layers and surfaces the latest AI-generated insight.

widgets.title: Overall Quality Score (latest run)
widgets.query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN passed THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100, 1) AS quality_score_pct FROM dq_project.quality_metrics WHERE run_timestamp = (SELECT MAX(run_timestamp) FROM dq_project.quality_metrics)

widgets.title: Quality Score Over Time (per layer)
widgets.query: SELECT DATE(run_timestamp) AS run_date, layer, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN passed THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100, 1) AS quality_score FROM dq_project.quality_metrics GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

widgets.title: Failing Checks — Latest Run
widgets.query: SELECT layer, table_name, check_name, column_name, metric_value, threshold, details FROM dq_project.quality_metrics WHERE passed = false AND run_timestamp = (SELECT MAX(run_timestamp) FROM dq_project.quality_metrics) ORDER BY layer, check_name

widgets.title: Null Rate by Column (latest run)
widgets.query: SELECT column_name, layer, metric_value AS null_rate FROM dq_project.quality_metrics WHERE check_name = 'null_rate' AND run_timestamp = (SELECT MAX(run_timestamp) FROM dq_project.quality_metrics) ORDER BY null_rate DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Latest AI Insight
widgets.query: SELECT run_timestamp, severity, summary, root_cause, suggested_action FROM dq_project.ai_insights ORDER BY run_timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

widgets.title: AI Insight Severity Over Time
widgets.query: SELECT DATE(run_timestamp) AS run_date, severity, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dq_project.ai_insights GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
